scenes.description: MC section with Takanashi Kiara, Mori Calliope, and Ninomae Ina'nis talking on stage.
Takanashi Kiara performs "Confessions of a Rotten Girl" solo on stage.

subtitles.english: I'm a rotten girl.

subtitles.original: But my patience is running thin.

subtitles.english: I'm a dirty, rotten girl.

subtitles.original: Rising up, rising up to the sky?

subtitles.original: And stems of toxic fear gripping my skin,

subtitles.english: And something shifts within this wicked play.
